steps.title: Move all terms to one side
steps.content:
Start with the given equation, add $36$ to both sides, and multiply by $-1$ to make factoring easier.
$$-4x^2-7x=-36$$
$$-4x^2-7x+36=0$$
$$4x^2+7x-36=0$$

steps.title: Choose the positive solution
steps.content:
Set each factor equal to $0$.
$$4x-9=0\to x=\frac{9}{4}$$
$$x+4=0\to x=-4$$
The positive solution is $\frac{9}{4}$. The answer is B.
